scenarios.description:
parseInput(String html, String baseUri) returns a Document with parsed

element when given simple HTML
scenarios.precondition: Parser using default HtmlTreeBuilder; no mocks
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Document contains a

element whose text() is "text" and baseUri equals supplied baseUri
pseudocode:
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); String html = "

text

"; String base = "http://example.com";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader inputHtml, String baseUri) returns a Document with parsed <div> element for Reader input
scenarios.precondition: Parser using default HtmlTreeBuilder; no mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document contains a <div> element whose text() is "hello"
pseudocode:
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Reader r = new StringReader("
hello
"); String base = "";

scenarios.description: parseInput(String html, String baseUri) throws NullPointerException when html is null
scenarios.precondition: Parser using default HtmlTreeBuilder; no mocks
pseudocode: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); String html = null; String base = "http://x";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader inputHtml, String baseUri) throws IllegalArgumentException when inputHtml is null
scenarios.precondition: Parser using default HtmlTreeBuilder; no mocks
pseudocode: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Reader r = null; String base = "";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader inputHtml, String baseUri) propagates treeBuilder.parse exception from stubbed TreeBuilder
scenarios.precondition: Parser.setTreeBuilder uses a stub TreeBuilder whose parse(...) throws IllegalStateException for isolation
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IllegalStateException with message "stub parse fail"
pseudocode: Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); TreeBuilder stub = new TreeBuilderStub(){ public Document parse(Reader in,String base,Parser p){throw new IllegalStateException("stub parse fail");}}; parser.setTreeBuilder(stub); Reader r = new StringReader("irrelevant");
throws IllegalStateException with message "stub parse fail";
